Something you don’t just read, something you feel.
About the Magazine

A digital-first sanctuary for the art of recovery.

The Art of Recovery is a premium, digital-first publication living across a dedicated app and website — devoted to mental health, healing journeys, and the quiet, deliberate craft of becoming whole again.

“Recovery isn’t something that happens to you. It’s something you create.”

We tell the stories the wellness world too often skips — the messy, luminous, deeply human work of putting a life back together. Our voice is intimate, literary, and unflinchingly hopeful.

Published monthly and built for the way people read now — beautifully on screen, anywhere — each issue pairs editorial depth with cinematic design, reaching a readership that is intentional, invested, and emotionally engaged.

Digital-First

Native app + responsive web, designed for immersive on-screen reading.

Healing-Focused

Mental health, sobriety, and the everyday artistry of recovery.

Editorially Premium

Long-form storytelling with a wellness-meets-Vogue sensibility.

Why Advertise With Us

A rare, premium environment for a meaningful message.

01

An Engaged Niche Audience

Reach readers who are actively invested in healing, wellness, and intentional living — an audience that leans in, not scrolls past.

02

A Premium Editorial Setting

Your brand appears within a cinematic, luxe publication where design and trust elevate every placement.

03

Multi-Platform Exposure

One partnership spans the app, the website, and our social channels — compounding impressions across every touchpoint.

04

Aligned, Trusted Context

Recovery is personal. Advertising beside it earns a level of attention and goodwill mainstream media can’t replicate.

LOCK IN YOUR RATE
